metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Apurv Bazari

plugins.name: onboard
plugins.description: Analyze codebases and generate tailored Claude tooling — v2 context shape; rejects v1 input (use onboard@1.10.0 for v1)

plugins.name: notify
plugins.description: Cross-platform system notifications for Claude Code — macOS and Linux with duration filtering

plugins.name: greenfield
plugins.description: Scaffold new projects via adaptive wizard with per-phase synthesis review; delegates to onboard for tooling generation

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Save and resume session handoffs — capture intent at session end, surface it at the next SessionStart
